subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter of September 9, 1909, was received. The grievous events that have transpired have brought sorrow and distress [3.5s]... ...Thou didst ask as to the transfiguration of Jesus, with Moses and Elias and the Heavenly Father on Mount Tabor, as referred to in the Bible
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه نهم سبتمبر ۱۹۰۹ وصول یافت از حوادث واقعه محزون و مگدر
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment, @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul
